principle: Weakness is treated as a testable hypothesis. Training tasks are validation probes, not random practice.

tasks.purpose: Use a historical evidence problem to verify whether the diagnosed weakness still appears on a familiar pattern.
tasks.successSignal: Can write executable 30/50/70/100-point routes before coding.
tasks.failureSignal: Cannot split 30/50/70 points or skips brute-force route.

tasks.purpose: Change constraints or output target to verify transfer, not memorization.
tasks.successSignal: Can write executable 30/50/70/100-point routes before coding.
tasks.failureSignal: Cannot split 30/50/70 points or skips brute-force route.

tasks.purpose: Use an original diagnostic draft to deliberately expose the suspected weak stage.

tasks.failureSignal: Cannot split 30/50/70 points or skips brute-force route.
